articles.title: He’s running the Boston Marathon for the ‘amazing’ Make-A-Wish children
articles.description:
Jason Perry is running the 2026 Boston Marathon.

The post He’s running the Boston Marathon for the ‘amazing’ Make-A-Wish children appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jason Perry will run the 2026 Boston Marathon to support Make-A-Wish children.
Perry aims to raise funds for local children with critical illnesses.
His efforts will directly benefit Boston families through the Make-A-Wish Foundation.

articles.title: Insider predicts Patriots sign Seahawks standout pass rusher, but don’t land Alec Pierce in free agency
articles.description:
The Patriots are seemingly on the market for an edge rusher as NFL free agency opens on Monday.

The post Insider predicts Patriots sign Seahawks standout pass rusher, but don’t land Alec Pierce in free agency appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots target edge rusher as NFL free agency opens on March 13.
Insider predicts signing Seahawks pass rusher Boye Mafe.
Alec Pierce, a sought-after receiver, remains unattainable for the Patriots.

articles.title: Review & setlist: With sharp sarcasm, Jesse Welles took on war, bullies, and Trump at the House of Blues
articles.description:
"Maybe war is a God and we're just super superstitious; it's gonna take a lot of blood, 'cause boy, are we religious."

The post Review & setlist: With sharp sarcasm, Jesse Welles took on war, bullies, and Trump at the House of Blues appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jesse Welles performed at House of Blues on March 6, 2026, addressing social issues.
Welles used sharp sarcasm to critique war and political figures, resonating with Boston audiences.
The concert highlighted local sentiments on national issues, fostering community discussion.
